message:
test: corpus-replay integration tests for all 9 fuzz targets

Reads every seed file from fuzz/corpus/ and feeds it through the
corresponding parser at test time, catching panics without needing
a sanitizer build. Covers all 9 fuzz targets:

- scan_pipeline_quick: quick_scan on raw bytes
- config_toml_parser: Config::from_toml
- tuning_config_toml: TuningConfig TOML deser
- osc_marker_parser: parse_osc133_markers + state machine
- string_parsers: CautService::from_cli_input + SeverityLevel::from_str_loose
- recorder_event_json: parse_recorder_event_json
- ntm_importer_json: parse_ntm_sessions/workflows/config
- pattern_pack_parser: PatternPack + PatternEngine::with_packs
- fts_query: SQLite FTS5 MATCH queries on in-memory DB

Result: 9 tests, 69+ seeds (positive + adversarial), 0 crashes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
